creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
Created attachment 259326
[PATCH] Features/pie.mk: add PIE_CFLAGS to FCFLAGS for fortran projects

Here's a patch that I (accidentally) independently wrote before finding this bug. This fixes PIE_UNSAFE for net/openmpi and math/py-numpy, but does NOT fix it for science/py-scipy. Please see if this patch can be merged with yours.
